mapper.select: SELECT C.QA_ID as qaId, C.QESTN_SJ as qestnSj, C.QESTN_CN as qestnCn, C.WRITNG_PASSWORD as writngPassword, C.AREA_NO as areaNo, C.MIDDLE_TELNO as middleTelno, C.END_TELNO as endTelno, C.EMAIL_ADRES as emailAdres, C.EMAIL_ANSWER_AT as emailAnswerAt, C.WRTER_NM as wrterNm, C.WRITNG_DE as writngDe, C.ANSWER_CN as answerCn, C.ANSWER_DE as answerDe, C.RDCNT as inqireCo, C.QNA_PROCESS_STTUS_CODE as qnaProcessSttusCode, D.CODE_NM as qnaProcessSttusCodeNm, A.USER_NM as emplyrNm, A.OFFM_TELNO as offmTelno, A.EMAIL_ADRES as aemailAdres, B.ORGNZT_NM as orgnztNm, DATE_FORMAT(C.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as frstRegisterPnttm, C.FRST_REGISTER_ID as frstRegisterId, DATE_FORMAT(C.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as lastUpdusrPnttm, C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID as lastUpdusrId FROM LETTNQAINFO C LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE_ID ='COM028' AND C.QNA_PROCESS_STTUS_CODE = D.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTNEMPLYRINFO A ON A.ESNTL_ID= C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTNORGNZTINFO B ON A.ORGNZT_ID = B.ORGNZT_ID WHERE QA_ID=#{qaId}

SELECT QA_ID as qaId, QESTN_SJ as qestnSj, QESTN_CN as qestnCn, WRITNG_PASSWORD as writngPassword, AREA_NO as areaNo, MIDDLE_TELNO as middleTelno, END_TELNO as endTelno, EMAIL_ADRES as emailAdres, EMAIL_ANSWER_AT as emailAnswerAt, WRTER_NM as wrterNm, WRITNG_DE as writngDe, ANSWER_CN as answerCn, ANSWER_DE as answerDe, RDCNT as inqireCo, QNA_PROCESS_STTUS_CODE as qnaProcessSttusCode, B.CODE_NM as qnaProcessSttusCodeNm, DATE_FORMAT(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') as frstRegisterPnttm, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID as frstRegisterId, DATE_FORMAT(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as lastUpdusrPnttm, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID as lastUpdusrId FROM LETTNQAINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE B ON B.CODE_ID ='COM028' AND A.QNA_PROCESS_STTUS_CODE = B.CODE WHERE 1=1
AND WRTER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND QESTN_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY QA_ID DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNQAINFO WHERE 1=1
AND WRTER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND QESTN_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT C.QA_ID as qaId, C.QESTN_SJ as qestnSj, C.QESTN_CN as qestnCn, C.WRITNG_PASSWORD as writngPassword, C.AREA_NO as areaNo, C.MIDDLE_TELNO as middleTelno, C.END_TELNO as endTelno, C.EMAIL_ADRES as emailAdres, C.EMAIL_ANSWER_AT as emailAnswerAt, C.WRTER_NM as wrterNm, C.WRITNG_DE as writngDe, C.ANSWER_CN as answerCn, C.ANSWER_DE as answerDe, C.RDCNT as inqireCo, C.QNA_PROCESS_STTUS_CODE as qnaProcessSttusCode, D.CODE_NM as qnaProcessSttusCodeNm, A.USER_NM as emplyrNm, A.OFFM_TELNO as offmTelno, A.EMAIL_ADRES as aemailAdres, B.ORGNZT_NM as orgnztNm, DATE_FORMAT(C.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as frstRegisterPnttm, C.FRST_REGISTER_ID as frstRegisterId, DATE_FORMAT(C.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as lastUpdusrPnttm, C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID as lastUpdusrId FROM LETTNQAINFO C LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE_ID ='COM028' AND C.QNA_PROCESS_STTUS_CODE = D.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTNEMPLYRINFO A ON A.ESNTL_ID= C.LAST_UPDUSR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTNORGNZTINFO B ON A.ORGNZT_ID = B.ORGNZT_ID WHERE QA_ID=#{qaId}

SELECT QA_ID as qaId, QESTN_SJ as qestnSj, QESTN_CN as qestnCn, WRITNG_PASSWORD as writngPassword, AREA_NO as areaNo, MIDDLE_TELNO as middleTelno, END_TELNO as endTelno, EMAIL_ADRES as emailAdres, EMAIL_ANSWER_AT as emailAnswerAt, WRTER_NM as wrterNm, WRITNG_DE as writngDe, ANSWER_CN as answerCn, ANSWER_DE as answerDe, RDCNT as inqireCo, QNA_PROCESS_STTUS_CODE as qnaProcessSttusCode, B.CODE_NM as qnaProcessSttusCodeNm, DATE_FORMAT(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') as frstRegisterPnttm , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as lastUpdusrPnttm , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM LETTNQAINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTCCMMNDETAILCODE B ON B.CODE_ID ='COM028' AND A.QNA_PROCESS_STTUS_CODE = B.CODE WHERE 1=1
AND WRTER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY QA_ID DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNQAINFO WHERE 1=1
AND WRTER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND QNA_PROCESS_STTUS_CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
